---
title: "theme_stwd"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L467)

# `theme_stwd()`

STWD Theme for Storytelling

## Usage

```r
theme_stwd(base_size = 11, base_family = "")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `base_size` | Base font size. Default: 11. |
| `base_family` | Base font family. Default: "" (system default). |

## Value

A ggplot2 theme object.

## Description

A clean, minimal theme optimized for data storytelling. Follows
best practices from "Storytelling with Data" - removes distractions,
emphasizes the data, and provides clean typography.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) +
    geom_point() +
    theme_stwd()

## End(Not run)
```
